user.title: Home Assistant Custom Fonts Setup
user.description: Configure global font settings for Home Assistant UI.

data.font_url: Font URL (Google Fonts CSS or direct file URL)
data.apply_to_shadow_dom: Force font into Shadow DOM (legacy fallback)

data_description.font_url: For Google Fonts, paste the full CSS URL from fonts.google.com
data_description.font_size: Set to 0 to keep the original Home Assistant font size
data_description.apply_to_shadow_dom: Leave OFF. Only enable for very old themes that ignore HA's CSS variables. Forcing the font may break custom cards (flipdown-timer-card, scheduler-card, bubble-card, etc.) and badge spacing on the Android Companion App.

abort.already_configured: Home Assistant Custom Fonts is already configured.

data.apply_to_shadow_dom: Force font into Shadow DOM (legacy fallback)
